The '''Rhen Varites''' were a species indigenous to [[Rhen Var/Legends|Rhen Var]], where they built beautiful cathedral-like buildings. They went extinct when their homeworld entered an ice age.

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 1|''Tales of the Jedi – Redemption'' 1]] {{1stm}}
